# section1328.org

> Guide to 11 U.S.C. Section 1328 -- Chapter 13 discharge provisions and the superdischarge.

section1328.org is a free, open-source educational resource about Section 1328 of the Bankruptcy Code. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://section1328.org/: Guide to Section 1328 -- Chapter 13 discharge, superdischarge, and hardship discharge

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
